name: Minecraft Automated Driver (Client Agent)
description: In-game control-plane agent for Minecraft Automated Driver. DISABLED BY DEFAULT: it self-disables unless launched with -Dfairyfox.driver.enable=true, or enabled in-game via the title-screen 'Automated Testing…' button + confirmation (which lasts only until the game closes). When enabled it listens on 127.0.0.1 only, on an ephemeral port, authenticated with a per-session token (see docs/control-protocol.md and SECURITY.md). Client-side only; GitHub releases only.
